## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between GrowthX and Fieldguide to explore GrowthX's content creation process and potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fieldguide seeks to improve top-of-funnel marketing and LLM search visibility with a lean team](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an AI-powered content engine with human expertise for high-quality, targeted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Fieldguide expressed concerns about content volume and maintaining brand voice, which GrowthX addressed with customizable solutions](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [GrowthX's strategy involves comprehensive topic mapping and outpacing competitors in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Creation at Fieldguide

  - [Very low, inconsistent content production](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [No regular cadence for SEO-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Previously worked with a contractor for a small amount of content over 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-powered platform with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Creates custom knowledge base for each client](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Employs agentic workflows for research, drafting, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Produces high-quality, contextually relevant content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Adapts to various industries and compliance requirements (legal, medical, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Content Strategy and Volume

  - [GrowthX maps all relevant topics based on audience needs and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Recommends creating more content than initially anticipated (e.g., 120+ resources to catch up with a competitor)](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Suggests refreshing content every \~3 months to stay current](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Offers flexibility in content placement (e.g., separate "guides" section vs. main blog)](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

### SEO and SEM Integration

  - [GrowthX's approach helps identify more terms for paid search bidding](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Creates comparison content to insert client into competitive conversations](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Organic content growth expands retargeting pool for more effective paid search](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Suggests bid modifiers for retargeted audiences on expensive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Quality Control and Brand Alignment

  - [GrowthX acts as an extension of the client's team](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Incorporates client's brand guidelines and voice](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Offers a review process before content publication](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Customizable workflow to match client's specific needs and complexity](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [GrowthX provides dashboards for insights into improvements and trends](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Showcased examples of traffic growth for other clients after implementing their strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenny and Yasina to discuss H2 plans and preliminary H1 targets](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
  - [Fieldguide team to inform Mark (leadership) next week](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Fieldguide to circle back to GrowthX with decision](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [If interested, earliest available kickoff for GrowthX strategy sprint would be in October due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/wiDzeXRp7A-Ue6yia32-ppsRWeK3_vf2?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
